# AGENTS.md
# /Users/daverobertson/Desktop/Code/20-prototypes/MLB/

## Project Overview

MLB Ballparks Quest is a static local first MLB trip planning prototype. The current goal is to promote the stronger prototype build into the primary root app and keep older root work archived for reference.

## Stack

- Static HTML
- CSS
- Vanilla JavaScript
- localStorage
- GitHub Pages

## Key Decisions

- Keep the app static and local first
- Use local schedule data instead of a live backend
- Store team marks locally inside the app
- Promote the prototype build to the root app as version 0.8
- Archive replaced root app files under `archive/`
